text: Started as a chemist. Ended up fighting for democracy. No regrets.
Reads more books than is strictly healthy. Has the shelves to prove it.
Community organiser & team builder. Ran campaigns with 1,100+ people. Coalitions over committees.
Comics are serious literature. This is not a debate.
Thinks in 4 languages. Works across 3 countries. Sleeps too little.
Fascinated by evolution since childhood. The questions never got smaller.
Warning: workshops will involve pair work. You've been warned.
